title: mentha × verticillata var. moenchiana
intro: Mentha × verticillata var. moenchiana, also known as red-veined mint or German mint, is a perennial plant that belongs to the mint family and is a hybrid of Mentha × verticillata and Mentha aquatica. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive benefits. The health benefits of Mentha × verticillata var. moenchiana include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and combat infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote oral health, reduce stress, and improve respiratory function.
